title: Licensed Practical Nurse
description: Mass General Brigham is a world-renowned healthcare system providing innovative care across a network of hospitals. As a Licensed Practical Nurse, you'll deliver compassionate care to diverse patient populations.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care under RN supervision
Assess patient vital signs and report changes to nursing staff
Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
Support infection control and safety protocols
Assist with patient hygiene, comfort, and education

requirements.education: Diploma or Associate's degree in Nursing; LPN license required
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of nursing or healthcare experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
